title: Huawei PDC240S12-CN power supply for S620
description: Huawei PDC240S12-CN is a power supply for the Huawei S620-24T16X8Y2CZ switch with an input power voltage of +48V/-48V/-60V DC, featuring hot swap capability. Output power is 240W +48V DC: 38.4V to 57V DC 48V/-60V DC: -38.4V to -72V DC GPSR
